productDisplayName: Puma Men Cell Pavo White Casual Shoes
description: Don't let the all the crazy complications of your day get you down. Slip into the puma Cell Pavo NM shoe and ease the stress during comfortable work outs. Upper Synthetic leather upper material for durability and flexibility Lightly padded collar and tongue for added support Lace closure for a snug Fit Midsole PET lining and EVA moulded sockliner for comfort CM-EVA midsole with 10 cell technology in the heel and midfoot TPU shank for comfort Outsole Durable rubber outsole for excellent grip and traction
